title: app PE 分位 lookback 可配 + inception 逻辑
key_findings: const valuationLookbackYears=5 已删除，替换为 App.valuationLookback int 字段（New() 默认 5，行为与原始一致）
lixinger cvpos 只有 y3/y5/y10 三档，0（since inception）必须映射到 y10（最深档），这是外部 API 限制，本期不绕过
EPS 多取（inception floor 取 100 年前）不改 PE 分位结果：percentile 窗口由 ohlcv 决定，EPS 仅用于步进对齐，TestReconstructPercentileUnaffectedByEPSOverfetch 钉死此不变量
code-simplifier 将 EPS 窗口计算提取为 epsFetchStart(end time.Time) time.Time 命名方法，与 lixingerLookback() 并排，意图更清晰

decisions.decision: lixingerLookback() 独立于 valuationLookback，0 映射 10，非 0 透传
decisions.rationale: lixinger API 无全历史档，inception 语义在此路径只能近似为最长可用窗口 y10；独立方法使映射规则集中且可测

decisions.decision: epsFetchStart 取 -100 年而非哨兵常量
decisions.rationale: 100 年足以覆盖任何实际上市日；yahoo/qlibpit FetchEPSHistory 按 start 参数过滤，超出上市日的请求会返回实际存在的数据，无副作用

decisions.decision: 提取 epsFetchStart helper（code-simplifier 建议，采纳）
decisions.rationale: 将固定窗口与 inception 两种逻辑封装在一处，buildFundamental default 分支调用点变为单行，注释说明过取无害的原因

interfaces_exposed.SetValuationLookback: func (a *App) SetValuationLookback(years int) — sets PE-percentile lookback in years; 0 = since inception. Must be called before Start.
interfaces_exposed.lixingerLookback: func (a *App) lixingerLookback() int — internal; maps 0→10, else passthrough. Used by Task 6 serve.go wiring.
interfaces_exposed.epsFetchStart: func (a *App) epsFetchStart(end time.Time) time.Time — internal; returns EPS fetch start date based on valuationLookback.

verification.result: PASS — all tests including 4 new Task 5 tests; zero regression on existing buildFundamental path tests
verification.commit: 8a1961c feat(app): configurable valuation lookback with since-inception mode
